---
title: "Vidit_LDA_Exercise_WashU"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-06"
---

## Data Cleaning

```{R}
# Libraries
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{R}
# Reading the datasets
# Baseline Data
base = read_csv(here("files", "baseline_df.csv"))
# Visits Data
vis = read_csv(here("files", "visits_df.csv"))
# Exits and Death Data
outcome = read_csv(here("files", "outcomes_df.csv"))

# Summary check for all datasets
summary(base)
print("---")
summary(vis)
print("---")
summary(outcome)

# View all of them
view(base)
view(vis)
view(outcome)
```

```{R}
# Data Cleaning, Manipulation and Merging
# Ignoring NAs or missingnes for now
# First cleaning base
base = base |>
  mutate(sex = as.factor(sex))
summary(base$sex)
# So, sex = 1, M, male, Male means males and otherwise female
base_clean = base |>
  mutate(male = factor(
  ifelse(sex %in% c(1, "M", "male", "Male"), 1, 0),
  levels = c(0, 1)
)) |>
  dplyr::select(-sex) |>
  mutate(entry_date = as.Date(entry_date, format = "%d-%b-%Y")) |>
  mutate(id = as.character(id))
summary(base_clean)

# Now cleaning vis
vis = vis |>
  mutate(visit_type = as.factor(visit_type))
summary(vis$visit_type)

vis_clean = vis |>
  mutate(
    visit_type = factor(tolower(as.character(visit_type))),
    id = as.character(id),
    visit_date = as.Date(visit_date, format = "%d/%m/%Y")
  ) |>
  mutate(
    across(starts_with("sbp"), ~ ifelse(.x <= 40, NA, .x)),
    across(starts_with("dbp"), ~ ifelse(.x <= 30, NA, .x))
  )
summary(vis_clean)

# Now cleaning outcome 
outcome = outcome |>
  mutate(exit_type = as.factor(exit_type))
summary(outcome$exit_type)

outcome_clean = outcome |>
  mutate(id = as.character(id),
    exit_date = as.Date(exit_date, format = "%d/%m/%Y"))

summary(outcome_clean)

# Joining the data!
full_data = base_clean |>
  left_join(vis_clean, by = "id") |>
  left_join(outcome_clean, by = "id")


full_data = full_data |>
  mutate(
    avg_sbp = rowMeans(cbind(sbp2, sbp3), na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_dbp = rowMeans(cbind(dbp2, dbp3), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

full_data = full_data |>
  mutate(
    a_med = as.factor(as.integer(
      if_any(
        c(amlodipine, bisoprolol, captopril, carvedilol,
          enalapril, furosemide, hctz, lisinopril,
          losaratan, metoprolol),
        ~ . == 1
      )
    ))
  )
summary(full_data)

write_csv(full_data, "files/full_data.csv")
```

```{R}
head(full_data, 20)
```

## Incident Hypertension

```{R}
make_table_kable = function(df, event_var) {
  
  # Prepare empty list to store rows
  table_rows = list()
  
  # Total row
  n = nrow(df)
  e = sum(df[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE)
  py = sum(df$py, na.rm = TRUE)
  inc = ifelse(py > 0, (e / py) * 1000, NA)
  table_rows[[1]] = data.frame(
    Category = "Total",
    `Disease Free (n)` = n,
    `Events (n)` = e,
    `Person-Years` = round(py,2),
    `Incidence per 1000 PYs` = round(inc,2)
  )
  
  # Sex rows
  for (sex in c(1,0)) {
    sub = df[df$male == sex, ]
    py_sub = sum(sub$py, na.rm = TRUE)
    inc_sub = ifelse(py_sub > 0, (sum(sub[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE) / py_sub) * 1000, NA)
    table_rows[[length(table_rows)+1]] = data.frame(
      Category = ifelse(sex==1,"Male","Female"),
      `Disease Free (n)` = nrow(sub),
      `Events (n)` = sum(sub[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
      `Person-Years` = round(py_sub,2),
      `Incidence per 1000 PYs` = round(inc_sub,2)
    )
  }
  
  # Age group rows
  groups = c("18-29 years","30-39 years","40-49 years","50-59 years","60+ years")
  for (g in groups) {
    sub = df[df$age_group == g, ]
    if (nrow(sub) > 0) {
      py_sub = sum(sub$py, na.rm = TRUE)
      inc_sub = ifelse(py_sub > 0, (sum(sub[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE) / py_sub) * 1000, NA)
      table_rows[[length(table_rows)+1]] = data.frame(
        Category = g,
        `Disease Free (n)` = nrow(sub),
        `Events (n)` = sum(sub[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
        `Person-Years` = round(py_sub,2),
        `Incidence per 1000 PYs` = round(inc_sub,2)
      )
    }
  }
  
  # Bind all rows
  out_table = do.call(rbind, table_rows)
  
  # Print kableExtra table
  out_table %>%
    kbl(caption = paste0("Incident Hypertension - ", event_var),
        align = "lrrrr") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, position = "left", bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"))
}

# Part A table
make_table_kable(person_df, "event_A")

# Part B table
make_table_kable(person_df, "event_B")
```
